name: open_ru_sts_v16_hard
description: Clean-first v16 hard-filtered recovery manifest: starts from v12_1600 and adds harder Vikhr Habr QA SBS preference pairs. Easy best/bad answer pairs are removed by requiring moderate lexical similarity.

datasets.notes: Inherited through the STS-v9/v12 initialization checkpoint, not used directly in v16-hard recovery.
Inherited through STS-v9/v12 initialization; excluded from v16-hard recovery.
Inherited through STS-v9/v12 initialization; excluded from v16-hard recovery.
Converted as question -> best answer with bad answer as a negative. Filters require min best/bad lexical similarity 0.18 and max 0.86, plus stronger answer length constraints, keeping 10352 records.
